name: Agent B - Document QA Chatbot
description: I Sell My Dreams by Gabriel García Márquez blends magical realism with mystery and emotion, centering on Frau Frieda, a Colombian woman who earns her living by selling dreams. After a fatal accident in Havana, the narrator suspects the dead woman—identified by her snake-shaped emerald ring—is the same enigmatic dream interpreter he once knew in Vienna. Known for influencing people’s lives through her dreams, she had advised the narrator to leave Vienna, which he did. Years later in Barcelona, she reappears and shares a strangely symmetrical dream experience with poet Pablo Neruda. Eventually, the narrator confirms from a Portuguese ambassador that the deceased woman was indeed Frau Frieda, who, when asked what she did, was described simply as someone who dreamed.

tools.name: FAISSVectorSearch
tools.description: Searches for similar document chunks using FAISS based on query embedding.

parameters.name: embedded_query
parameters.description: Vector representation of the user query

tools.name: OpenAIEmbeddings
tools.description: Converts user queries into embedding vectors using OpenAI’s text-embedding-ada-002 model.

capabilities: Maintains short-term memory of previous interactions
